functions.name: ErrorCard
params: { icon = "warn", title, reason, ctaLabel = "다시 시도", onAction }

functions.name: AdAccountCard
params: { name, id, currency, status, disabled, onChange }

functions.name: InstagramCard
params: { username, id, picture, pageId, igAccessToken, disabled, browseMode, onBrowseBlock, applyingToken, onApplyToken, onReload }

functions.name: PickerModal
params: { kind, title, subtitle, currentId, onClose, onPick }

callGraph.callee: ((data.accounts ?? []) as { id: string; name: string; currency: string; account_status: number }[]).map
((data.pages ?? []) as { id: string; name: string; igUserId: string | null; igUsername: string | null }[]).map

functions.name: CommentRow
params:
{
  comment,
  replies,
  repliesOpen,
  repliesLoading,
  replyDraft,
  replySubmitting,
  onToggleReplies,
  onHide,
  onDelete,
  onReplyDraft,
  onReplySubmit,
  onHideReply,
  onDeleteReply,
}

functions.name: ConfirmModal
params: { title, desc, confirmLabel, tone, onClose, onConfirm }

callGraph.callee:
fetch("/api/install/meta-app")
      .then((r) => r.json())
      .then((data) => setState(data))
      .catch(() => setState({ configured: false, clientId: null, audit: [] }))
      .finally

functions.name: PickRow
params:
{
  kind,
  title,
  meta,
  badge,
  busy,
  dimmed,
  disabled,
  onClick,
}

callGraph.callee:
fetchDraft(channel, suggestionTitle, suggestionDetail)
      .then((d) => { if (!cancelled) { setDraft(d); setStatus("ready"); } })
      .catch
